function.name: execute_python_code
function.description: Execute Python code in an isolated Firecracker microVM sandbox. Use this when the user asks you to run code, analyze data, create visualizations, or perform calculations. The sandbox has numpy, pandas, matplotlib, scipy, plotly, and seaborn pre-installed. State persists across calls within the same conversation.

function.name: launch_dashboard
function.description: Launch an interactive Panel dashboard inside the sandbox VM and return a browser URL. Use after execute_python_code has computed data — the dashboard reads the same files that the kernel wrote. The dashboard persists until the session ends or a new dashboard replaces it.

code.description: Panel dashboard Python code executed inside the VM.

framework.description: Visualization framework. Only panel is supported.
